LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MAINTAIN ITS SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION DOES NOT PRESENT EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATING HOW FERGUSON HAS STANDING TO SUE ON THE CREDIT APPLICATION. THAT AGREEMENT IS EXPRESSLY BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND WOLSELEY AND THERE IS NO EVIDENCE REGARDING THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN FERGUSON AND WOLSELEY. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, AKELE ATKINS FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND ROBERT FORDIANI FOR THE DEFENDANT. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. JUDGE KAY TSENIN, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D303

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
ROBERT J.A. FORDIANI, ESQ. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME MAKEOVERS, INC.).

APPEARANCES: Robert Fordiani, Esq. 816-7517 moving to be relieved as counsel for deft; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as moving party provided courtesy copies of moving papers including the proof of service. Upon further review, the Court granted the motion. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (as to the first cause of action).

Appearances: Robert J. A. Fordiani (816.7517) for defendant and responding party; Loraine Todd of George Sykulski APLC (818.783.8500) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party.

Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff failed to maintain its summary judgment burden. Plaintiff's motion does not present evidence demonstrating how Ferguson has standing to sue on the credit application. That agreement is expressly between defendant and Wolseley and there is no evidence regarding the relationship between Ferguson and Wolseley. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Continued To May-20-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO MAY 20, 2011. ALL PARTIES TO PROVIDE IMMEDIATELY TO DEPARTMENT 302 COURTESY COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
